case_title: MULUGETA GEBRAGEZABHER VS. TA'DARREL E. POSEY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - UNCLAIMED - COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT POSEY, TA'DARREL E. DBA CALIFORNIA ADVANCE PATROL CO.

DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TA'DARRELL POSEY--OWNER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 9/12/12. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
